{{Quote|The Jedi helped my home world of Eeyyon. I pledged to help whenever I could.|[[Teluron Thacker]]|<ref name="FS" />}}
'''Eeyyon''' was the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]<ref name="EAOC" /> [[Planet/Legends|planet]] saved by the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] prior to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. It was inhabited by a [[Unidentified Eeyyon species|species]] of tall, pale-skinned [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoids]]. Native of Eeyyon, [[Teluron Thacker]] swore to aid the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] wherever he was, in gratitude for the help given to his homeworld.<ref name="FS" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Quest: The Final Showdown]]'' {{Mo}}
